queue_item.action: Enforce the verifier trust boundary between authenticated certificate identity and workflow-controlled signed predicate metadata.

progress.finding: Repository, workflow, and issuer identity must come from the cryptographically verified certificate and verified timestamps; statement predicate metadata remains workflow-controlled even when signed.
progress.verification: 4 deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime using byte-identical pre-commit files

queue_item.handoff: Cloudflare Research and Vercel Studio should feed raw successful gh attestation verify --format=json output into this evaluator before trusted-builder or signer-authorization acceptance. Capture one real payload to validate field normalization.
